case_title: HIROKO MIDORIKAWA et al VS. ROBERT T. KAWAMOTO DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT KAWAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,340.00 FILED BY MIDORIKAWA, HIROKO RAFTER, ALEC AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT T. KAWAMOTO DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT KAWAM OTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDORIKAWA, HIROKO RAFTER, ALEC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROBERT T. KAWAMOTO DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT KAWAM OTO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SERVED PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT ON 12/03/09. ONE ALREADY ON FILE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-03-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERT T. KAWAMOTO DBA LAW OFFICES OF ROBERT KAWAM OTO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
RESPONSE TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
